event: Portrait of Saint Margaret of Antioch
symbols: crown — royal dignity and the crown of martyrdom
book — sacred Scripture or the faith for which the saint suffered
upward pointing hand — appeal to heaven and divine authority
stone with inscription — memorial and testimony of faith
landscape with trees — earthly setting contrasting with heavenly aspiration
classical drapery — noble bearing and timelessness of sanctity
description: A full-length portrait of a young woman standing in a landscape setting beside a large stone block bearing a partial inscription. She wears elegant classical drapery in blue, white, and dark green, with a small ornate crown atop her head. Her right hand is raised upward in a pointing gesture, while her left hand holds a closed book resting on the stone. She wears sandals and stands on rocky ground. Behind her, trees frame the scene and a distant landscape with small figures is visible. Her expression is contemplative with a slight downward gaze.
